news.title:
Coal India plans to divest up to 25% stakes in South Eastern Coalfields & Mahanadi Coalfields via OFS/IPO.
Wipro launches Seoul Innovation Lab; IRFC signs Rs 12,842 cr loan deal; Hindustan Foods expands via Ultra Beauty acquisition.
news.summary:
Coal India plans to divest up to 25% stakes in South Eastern Coalfields & Mahanadi Coalfields via OFS/IPO.
Wipro launches Seoul Innovation Lab; IRFC signs Rs 12,842 cr loan deal; Hindustan Foods expands via Ultra Beauty acquisition.

news.title:
IRFC signed a Rs 12,842 Cr refinancing loan with HURL.
The deal aims to optimize HURL's debt and enhance financial flexibility.
news.summary:
IRFC signed a Rs 12,842 Cr refinancing loan with HURL.
The deal aims to optimize HURL's debt and enhance financial flexibility.

news.title:
Indian Railway Finance Corporation (IRFC) confirmed servicing debt obligations, redeeming 485,972 NCDs worth ₹48.6 Cr on March 26, 2026.
Total redemption, including gross interest of ₹1.5 Cr, amounted to ₹50.1 Cr. Payment adjusted for holidays.
news.summary:
Indian Railway Finance Corporation (IRFC) confirmed servicing debt obligations, redeeming 485,972 NCDs worth ₹48.6 Cr on March 26, 2026.
Total redemption, including gross interest of ₹1.5 Cr, amounted to ₹50.1 Cr. Payment adjusted for holidays.

news.title:
IRFC's CMD plans offshore fundraising to reduce borrowing costs below 8%.
The goal is to achieve borrowing rates below the benchmark GSEC rate.
news.summary:
IRFC's CMD plans offshore fundraising to reduce borrowing costs below 8%.
The goal is to achieve borrowing rates below the benchmark GSEC rate.

news.title:
IRFC and RailTel dividend record date is March 13; last day to buy is today.
IRFC offers ₹1.05/share interim dividend, RailTel ₹1/share. RailTel rose 2% today.
news.summary:
IRFC and RailTel dividend record date is March 13; last day to buy is today.
IRFC offers ₹1.05/share interim dividend, RailTel ₹1/share. RailTel rose 2% today.

news.title:
IRFC conducts an ECB roadshow in Taiwan and Hong Kong.
The initiative aims to diversify and expand funding sources.
news.summary:
IRFC conducts an ECB roadshow in Taiwan and Hong Kong.
The initiative aims to diversify and expand funding sources.

news.title: Indian Railway Finance Corp board recommends Rs 1.05/share second interim dividend.
news.summary: Indian Railway Finance Corp board recommends Rs 1.05/share second interim dividend.

news.title: IRFC board approves second interim dividend for shareholders.
news.summary: IRFC board approves second interim dividend for shareholders.

news.title: Indian Railway Finance Corporation's board approves raising Rs. 70,000 crore for FY 2026-27.
news.summary: Indian Railway Finance Corporation's board approves raising Rs. 70,000 crore for FY 2026-27.

news.title:
SBI Cards, Indian Oil, IRFC among stocks turning ex-dividend this week.
Corporate actions include dividends, bonus shares, and stock splits, impacting liquidity and stock prices.
news.summary:
SBI Cards, Indian Oil, IRFC among stocks turning ex-dividend this week.
Corporate actions include dividends, bonus shares, and stock splits, impacting liquidity and stock prices.

news.title:
IRFC board to declare 2nd interim dividend for FY26, record date set as March 13.
IRFC Q3FY26 profit rises 11% YoY to Rs 1,802 cr; stock down 15% in a month.
news.summary:
IRFC board to declare 2nd interim dividend for FY26, record date set as March 13.
IRFC Q3FY26 profit rises 11% YoY to Rs 1,802 cr; stock down 15% in a month.

news.title:
IRFC held an ECB roadshow in Singapore to attract Japanese and Taiwanese investors, aiming to diversify funding for India's railway infrastructure.
IRFC shares traded at Rs. 97.8, with a turnover of Rs. 336.7M; potential lenders expressed confidence in its credit profile and strategy.
news.summary:
IRFC held an ECB roadshow in Singapore to attract Japanese and Taiwanese investors, aiming to diversify funding for India's railway infrastructure.
IRFC shares traded at Rs. 97.8, with a turnover of Rs. 336.7M; potential lenders expressed confidence in its credit profile and strategy.

news.title:
IRFC confirms servicing debt obligations, redeeming 10,500 NCDs on due dates.
Total redemption cum interest amounted to Rs. 1,078.2 crore, as per details provided.
news.summary:
IRFC confirms servicing debt obligations, redeeming 10,500 NCDs on due dates.
Total redemption cum interest amounted to Rs. 1,078.2 crore, as per details provided.

news.title:
IRFC shares dip below ₹100 for the first time since Jan '24.
Continued selling pressure contributes to the decline.
news.summary:
IRFC shares dip below ₹100 for the first time since Jan '24.
Continued selling pressure contributes to the decline.

news.title: Govt reduces stake in IRFC to 84.65% from 86.36% via sale offer.
news.summary: Govt reduces stake in IRFC to 84.65% from 86.36% via sale offer.

news.title:
IRFC hosted a two-day roadshow in Tokyo to engage Japanese investors.
The aim was to secure long-term funds and diversify currency profile.
news.summary:
IRFC hosted a two-day roadshow in Tokyo to engage Japanese investors.
The aim was to secure long-term funds and diversify currency profile.

news.title:
President of India sold 22.4 crore IRFC shares, 84.65% of promoter holding.
Sale occurred between Feb 25-27, 2026 under SEBI insider trading disclosure.
news.summary:
President of India sold 22.4 crore IRFC shares, 84.65% of promoter holding.
Sale occurred between Feb 25-27, 2026 under SEBI insider trading disclosure.

news.title:
HCLTech signed MoU with IIT Kanpur for scalable solutions; IRFC board to meet on March 9 for interim dividend.
Hindalco's US acquisition review delayed; BPCL forms Singapore subsidiary; Greaves Cotton expands to Nepal.
news.summary:
HCLTech signed MoU with IIT Kanpur for scalable solutions; IRFC board to meet on March 9 for interim dividend.
Hindalco's US acquisition review delayed; BPCL forms Singapore subsidiary; Greaves Cotton expands to Nepal.

news.title:
Indian Railway Finance Corporation's board meeting on 9th March 2026 will consider the second interim dividend for FY 2025-26.
Trading window closes from 27th Feb to 48 hours post-meeting. Shareholders must update tax/records for TDS compliance by 13th March 2026.
news.summary:
Indian Railway Finance Corporation's board meeting on 9th March 2026 will consider the second interim dividend for FY 2025-26.
Trading window closes from 27th Feb to 48 hours post-meeting. Shareholders must update tax/records for TDS compliance by 13th March 2026.

news.title:
IRFC's OFS saw 95% subscription, raising concerns about government divestment appetite amid market uncertainties. Adani Ports repurchased $196.9M bonds, aiming to manage debt and reassure investors.
Lodha Developers acquired Malabar Hill land for Rs 2,800 crore project. Vikram Solar focuses on domestic growth despite US trade duties. Lupin faces GST probe; RIL boosts digital ecosystem with Facebook.
news.summary:
IRFC's OFS saw 95% subscription, raising concerns about government divestment appetite amid market uncertainties. Adani Ports repurchased $196.9M bonds, aiming to manage debt and reassure investors.
Lodha Developers acquired Malabar Hill land for Rs 2,800 crore project. Vikram Solar focuses on domestic growth despite US trade duties. Lupin faces GST probe; RIL boosts digital ecosystem with Facebook.
